llm_training.natural_language_description: The Noodle Bowl Plushy (Small) is a novelty plush toy sold as merchandise via field survey data through The Noodle Place restaurant on Circular Road. It is not a food product and is not intended for consumption. The item features a decorative noodle bowl design with vibrant sushi-themed embellishments and soft plush fabric construction. It is sold as a collectible or gift item alongside food orders. Because this is a non-food merchandise item, it has no nutritional composition, no glycemic index, and no dietary relevance. It should not be catalogued in a food nutrition database as a food entry. The item is priced between SGD 9.90 and SGD 14.90 and is available in a small size variant. This record is flagged as a non-food item that was incorrectly seeded into the food database from field survey listing data.

This record cannot achieve a full PASS score under Project Veritas v2 because it is not a food product and cannot satisfy nutritional completeness requirements.

Iteration 2: Previous iteration produced invalid JSON (empty output). Rebuilt complete valid JSON from scratch.

Iteration 3: Verified JSON validity. Confirmed all -1 sentinel values documented in notes. Confirmed aliases_by_language and flat aliases are perfectly consistent. Confirmed glycemic_index set to 1 per convention. Confirmed all three health conditions present. Confirmed ontology match_type values use only allowed strings (none). Score assessed at 5/8 — FAIL due to inherent non-food nature of item.
veritas_qc.reviewer_summary: FAIL — GD002821 is a novelty plush toy (Noodle Bowl Plushy Small) sold as merchandise via field survey data. It is not a food product. The record cannot pass Project Veritas v2 nutritional completeness requirements (Q2, Q3) because no nutritional data exists or is applicable for a non-food item. All hard gates pass. Score is 5/8. Recommended action: remove this record from the food database pipeline and flag the field survey data ingestion process to exclude non-food merchandise listings.
